The original [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]], '''Sobrik''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] and industrial region located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Balmorra. Located in the city was the [[Sunken Sarlacc cantina]] and many Imperial bunkers, including the headquarters [[Camp Vigil]]—which the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] established as its center of operations, thanks to its position near the [[Balmorran Arms/Legends|Balmorran Arms]] factory, as well as the [[Troida Military Workshop]] and [[Okara Droid Factory]] to the south and southeast respectively.

==History==
The [[City/Legends|city]] of Sobrik was built as the original capital of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]], though around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Jedi Civil War]], the city of [[Bin Prime]] was chosen to replace it. As such it was later shrunk, and during the [[Battle of Balmorra (Galactic Wars)|Battle of Balmorra]] was repeatedly bombarded and then rebuilt by [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Imperial]] engineers

During the invasion, Sobrik was generally patrolled by Imperial vehicles and troops, and it gave a strong impression to any onlooking [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Spy/Legends|spies]]. The city housed a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]], and many Imperial buildings, such as bases, control centers and barracks. It also featured an account building where civilians could store their belongings.
